rows.description: Soluta Scholaris Casamiense

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Charles Curtis and to parties at Newington in respect of fines, amounting to £3 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Monetary values agreed. Selected gemini-flash description. Visual verification confirmed '27' (not '28'), 'Magistro' (not 'Magistrs'), and 'Decrem ad Heb' (not 'decern: adtest') as more accurate readings.

rows.description: - 20 - Repd Mr Upton Turnpke Expences on the Prograffs
rows.notes: Monetary values agreed. Selected gemini-flash description. Visual verification confirmed 'Repd' (not 'Recd'), 'Turnpke' (abbreviation), and 'Prograffs' (double 'f') as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's interpretations.
rows.english_description: Repayment to Mr Upton for turnpike (road/toll) expenses incurred on the progress/programmes.

rows.description: - 25 - Paid Dr Williams Sr Newgton Vic: 1/2 year to Mich: last
rows.notes: Monetary values agreed. Selected gemini-flash description. gpt-5-mini incorrectly inferred 'Novr 25' for this date, which is visually a '- 25 -' continuation. 'Sr' (Senior) is also a better reading than 'S.'.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-year payment to Dr Williams, vicar of Newington, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Added from gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini completely missed this distinct marginal header row and incorrectly absorbed '1770' into the following entry's description. Visual verification confirms '1770' as a standalone header.

rows.description: Janry 4 - allow'd John Chown Tenant of the wild Brick for
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms this is a distinct physical line, the first part of a two-line entry, with no associated amount on this line. gpt-5-mini combined this with the next line and incorrectly included the '1770' header in its description. 'Brick' (not 'Irish') is also a clearer reading.
rows.english_description: Allowance granted to John Chown, tenant of the Wild Brick property (entry incomplete).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Allowance granted to John Chown, tenant of the Wild Brick property; no structured amount recorded on this line.

rows.description: Taxes left unpaid by the former Tenant failing -
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for description and amounts. rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of taxes left unpaid by the former tenant, amounting to £1 1s 4d.
